title: viola × columbiana
intro: Viola × columbiana, also known as the hybrid viola or columbian pansy, is a type of flowering plant that is a hybrid of two species of viola. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems. The health benefits of Viola × columbiana include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Viola × columbiana, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers of the plant in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
